title: Evans_Version
text:
library(httr)

Warning: package 'httr' was built under R version 4.4.1

response <- GET("https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q=Iran&from=2026-05-20&language=en&pageSize=50&apiKey=173ec253cb06408abbf28061323e5fb4")

str(response, max.level = 1)

List of 10
 $ url        : chr "https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q=Iran&from=2026-05-20&language=en&pageSize=50&apiKey=173ec253cb06408abbf28061323e5fb4"
 $ status_code: int 200
 $ headers    :List of 14
  ..- attr(*, "class")= chr [1:2] "insensitive" "list"
 $ all_headers:List of 1
 $ cookies    :'data.frame':    0 obs. of  7 variables:
 $ content    : raw [1:37455] 7b 22 73 74 ...
 $ date       : POSIXct[1:1], format: "2026-06-10 18:09:19"
 $ times      : Named num [1:6] 0 0.129 0.166 0.204 0.325 ...
  ..- attr(*, "names")= chr [1:6] "redirect" "namelookup" "connect" "pretransfer" ...
 $ request    :List of 7
  ..- attr(*, "class")= chr "request"
 $ handle     :Class 'curl_handle' <externalptr> 
 - attr(*, "class")= chr "response"


Look at the content.

library(jsonlite)

Warning: package 'jsonlite' was built under R version 4.4.1

library(tibble)

Warning: package 'tibble' was built under R version 4.4.1

parsed_response <- fromJSON(rawToChar(response$content))
str(parsed_response, max.level = 1)

List of 3
 $ status      : chr "ok"
 $ totalResults: int 17482
 $ articles    :'data.frame':   50 obs. of  8 variables:


Pull a single article.

trump_article <- parsed_response$articles[4, ]
str(trump_article, max.level = 1)

'data.frame':   1 obs. of  8 variables:
 $ source     :'data.frame':    1 obs. of  2 variables:
 $ author     : chr NA
 $ title      : chr "Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down"
 $ description: chr "Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions."
 $ url        : chr "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cedp3lee059o"
 $ urlToImage : chr "https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/news/1024/branded_news/08db/live/a5895d30-5db6-11f1-8b6d-5b89cbb85786.jpg"
 $ publishedAt: chr "2026-06-01T15:25:54Z"
 $ content    : chr "It has emerged that the Saudis have attacked Iran, they say in retaliation for Iranian attacks. But significant"| __truncated__


Ehh. Let’s print it out better.

print(trump_article)

4 2026-06-01T15:25:54Z
                                                                                                                                                                                                               content
4 It has emerged that the Saudis have attacked Iran, they say in retaliation for Iranian attacks. But significantly, senior Saudi sources say they made it clear to Tehran that they were acting independ… [+45 chars]



trump_article$content

[1] "It has emerged that the Saudis have attacked Iran, they say in retaliation for Iranian attacks. But significantly, senior Saudi sources say they made it clear to Tehran that they were acting independ… [+45 chars]"






article_finder <- function(subject, 
                           date = format(Sys.Date() - 30, "%Y-%m-%d"), 
                           key = "173ec253cb06408abbf28061323e5fb4") {
  URL <- paste0("https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q=",
                 subject,
                 "&from=",
                 date,
                 "&language=en&pageSize=50&apiKey=",
                 key)
  response <- httr::GET(URL)
  
  parsed_response <- fromJSON(rawToChar(response$content))
}


football_articles <- article_finder("Football")
str(football_articles, max.level = 2)

 $ totalResults: int 27584

                 "&language=en&pageSize=50&apiKey=",

  parsed_response <- fromJSON(rawToChar(response$content))
}
